title: Amelioration
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6e8cd58f521b757b5d9a3560b5ac8e3972dce2ca.png)
Ever wanted to change the game visuals in a slightly better way? Then you are in the right place. **Amelioration** is here to help you.

![about](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9cb8805b4fcb750dcd8001cc9ad042274ffb1977.png)
This texture pack is related to changing the environment's small details and your builds to have a better look, changing your experience, and improving the old things based on the new style.

This texture pack does not fully retexture all parts of Minecraft, but revamps the textures that I thought were necessary. Some textures do feel old and don't match the new aesthetics of modern Minecraft art. So, as a modern pixel artist, I felt I needed to do it.

I was heavily influenced and got supported by my friends, who asked me to work as an independent artist besides working for multiple teams. Thanks to them also.



### Check [Gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/amelioration/gallery) for contents. 
**(Might not showcase everything)**





![FAQ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/20e676279ddcaf11aac29a411deb0fdafc9dd52a_0.webp)
What happened to the pack?
Ans: The current pack is discontinued and is merged to a new pack called Allure. This pack will not recieve any future update.
